MagiLux Studios develops games that blend entertainment with meaningful real-world impact — creating experiences that benefit players beyond play.

Current project

A VR rhythm game set among the stars, designed to support physical rehabilitation — focusing on arm and neck mobilization through immersive, music-driven movement.
